creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Mon Aug 20 01:28:05 2012
New Revision: 302774
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302774

Log:
  trytond_company is the company module for tryton.
  
  The company module defines the concepts of company and employee
  and extend the user model.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		170556
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_company/
  head/finance/trytond_company/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_company/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_company/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_company/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Mon Aug 20 01:16:17 2012	(r302773)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Mon Aug 20 01:28:05 2012	(r302774)
@@ -104,6 +104,7 @@
     SUBDIR += tinyerp-server
     SUBDIR += tryton
     SUBDIR += trytond
+    SUBDIR += trytond_company
     SUBDIR += trytond_country
     SUBDIR += trytond_currency
     SUBDIR += trytond_party

Added: head/finance/trytond_company/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_company/Makefile	Mon Aug 20 01:28:05 2012	(r302774)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_company
+# Date created:		12 August, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_company
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	The Company Module for Tryton
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_party>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_party \
+		trytond_currency>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_currency
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_company/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_company/distinfo	Mon Aug 20 01:28:05 2012	(r302774)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_company-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 17bc3fe4fcca0efcb5833adb4994c88f9d7d917ad56779f06379c473a4fa9d0d
+SIZE (trytond_company-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 51491

Added: head/finance/trytond_company/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_company/pkg-descr	Mon Aug 20 01:28:05 2012	(r302774)
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+trytond_company is the company module for tryton.
+
+The company module defines the concepts of company and employee
+and extend the user model.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
